sub_pixel_system.notes: Uses id Tech 1 engine; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Player character has stamina attribute that increases maximum health when improved at certain points in game

special_mechanics.name: Accuracy Attribute
special_mechanics.description: Player character has accuracy attribute that can be improved to increase ranged weapon accuracy

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Strife uses id Tech 1 engine (same as Doom/Doom II). Specific player movement physics not documented in available sources. Game focuses on RPG elements and storytelling rather than movement-based mechanics. FPS-standard movement expected but not explicitly detailed.
